label: Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO)

node.label: Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO)
node.definition: GRPO is a PPO-style policy update that estimates relative advantages from groups of sampled responses instead of learning a separate value model.
node.why_it_matters: It reduces critic-memory overhead and fits reasoning tasks where several candidate completions can share one verifiable reward rule.
limitations: Training depends on within-group reward variation, sampling diversity, clipping stability, and resistance to reward hacking.

dependencies.rationale: Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) is learned, selected, or evaluated using the objective family Policy-gradient & actor–critic objectives.
Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) is learned, selected, or evaluated using the objective family Preference optimization (RLHF, DPO families).
Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) is learned, selected, or evaluated using the objective family Outcome verifiers & executable rewards.
Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) uses Supervised fine-tuning & instruction tuning as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.

sentence_units.text: GRPO is a PPO-style policy update that estimates relative advantages from groups of sampled responses instead of learning a separate value model.
It reduces critic-memory overhead and fits reasoning tasks where several candidate completions can share one verifiable reward rule.
Training depends on within-group reward variation, sampling diversity, clipping stability, and resistance to reward hacking.
Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) is learned, selected, or evaluated using the objective family Policy-gradient & actor–critic objectives.
Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) is learned, selected, or evaluated using the objective family Preference optimization (RLHF, DPO families).
Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) is learned, selected, or evaluated using the objective family Outcome verifiers & executable rewards.
Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) uses Supervised fine-tuning & instruction tuning as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
